---
title: "Scientific Outcomes"
output: html_document
---

# Scientific Outcomes

I maintain an active academic track record; below are **selected highlights** and direct links to full lists.

## Selected Highlights
- **Omics technologies to understand drug toxicity mechanisms** — Review on how omics data reveal mechanisms of drug side effects. *Drug Discovery Today* (2022).
- **Epirubicin alters DNA methylation profiles related to cardiotoxicity** — DNA methylation changes linked to cardiotoxicity. *Frontiers in Bioscience* (2022).
- **Translational proteomics of anthracycline‑induced cardiotoxicity** — From cardiac microtissues to human biopsies. *Frontiers in Genetics* (2021).

> For full abstracts and citation details, visit my Publications page or Google Scholar.

<p class="cta">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="contact.html#book">Book a Decision Call</a>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg" href="mailto:aa@gmail.com">Email: aa@gmail.com</a>
</p>
